DISCOVERY 610, APPEARANCES: WILLIAM H. HOLSINGER, LAW OFFICES OF WILLIAM H. HOLSINGER, FOR PETITIONER AND MOVING PARTY: LESLIE M. ACKER SARA MCDWYER, ATTORNEY AT LAW FOR RESPONDENT AND OPPOSING PARTY: NANCY A,. TYNAN HEARING HELD. TENTATIVE ADOPTED WITH MODIFICATIONS. NO OPPOSITION HAVING BEEN FILED, PETITIONER'S MOTION IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. RESPONDENT IS ORDERED TO SERVE COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION TO INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS BY JANUARY 26, 2005. RESPONDENT IS ORDERED TO CONTACT COUNSEL FOR PETITIONER TO SCHEDULE HER DEPOSITION AT A MUTUALLY CONVENIENT TIME. THE DEPOSITION IS TO BE COMPLETED BY JANUARY 28, 2005. THE MOTION FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $616.30 ARE TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. THE MOTION FOR EVIDENTIARY AND ISSUE SANCTIONS IS DENIED. MODIFICATIONS: AS TO SANCTIONS AFTER HEARING. COMM: BRUCE E. CHAN
